title: festuca geniculata var. dasyantha
intro: Festuca geniculata var. dasyantha, also known as bent grass, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family and native to North America. The medicinal properties of Festuca geniculata var. dasyantha lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, calm digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Festuca geniculata var. dasyantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder for use in traditional medicine.
